# Chase Creative Co.

> Jacqueline Chase | Copywriter & Brand Strategist

Jacqueline Chase is a strategic copywriter and brand builder specializing in editorial content, brand messaging, and digital marketing. She helps growing brands find their voice and convert through high-impact copy.

## Key Services
- **Brand Messaging**: Developing unique voice and tone guidelines.
- **Editorial Copywriting**: Creating high-quality blog posts and thought leadership articles.
- **SEO Strategy**: Optimizing content for search engine visibility and user engagement.

## Sitemap
- [Home](https://chasecreative.co/) - Overview of services and featured work.
- [About](https://chasecreative.co/about) - Experience, background, and mission.
- [Services](https://chasecreative.co/services) - Detailed breakdown of copywriting offerings.
- [Work](https://chasecreative.co/work) - Portfolio of selected projects and case studies.
- [Blog](https://chasecreative.co/blog) - Articles, insights, and industry writing.
- [Contact](https://chasecreative.co/contact) - Project inquiries and booking.

## Technology Stack
Built with **Next.js 15**, **Sanity.io**, and **Framer Motion** for a high-performance, premium digital experience.
